creator: brent@jfi.uchicago.edu
text:
Very low severity issue, since if you need this driver, you'll probably look for it whether it's in the LINT file or not...but...

The 3ware driver ("tws") for recent 3Ware RAID cards is now shipped with the kernel but not described in /sys/conf/LINT or /sys/amd64/conf/LINT.

Probably also true on other OS versions besides 9.3.
